options.systemMessage: You are an expert quantitative trading strategist specializing in futures markets. You generate production-ready vectorbt Python strategies with precise risk management. Always output valid JSON. Never hallucinate indicators or functions that don't exist in vectorbt.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ strategy_name: $json.strategy_name, one_sentence: $json.one_sentence, python_code: $json.python_code, params: $json.params, symbol: $json.symbol, timeframe: $json.timeframe, start_date: $json.start_date, end_date: $json.end_date, source: $json.source }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'strategy_accepted', strategy_name: $json.strategy_name || $node['Parse AI Strategy Output'].json.strategy_name, tier: $json.tier, backtest_id: $json.id || $json.backtestId, metrics: { sharpe: $json.sharpe, max_drawdown: $json.max_drawdown, total_return: $json.total_return }, source: 'n8n-strategy-generation-loop', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

options.systemMessage: You are a senior quantitative analyst reviewing rejected trading strategies. Be specific and data-driven in your critique. Focus on actionable improvements.

parameters.description: Search past strategy generations to avoid duplicates and learn from previous attempts.
Search past critique assessments for consistency and reference previous evaluations.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: 'Strategy Gen Error', message: String($json.execution ? ($json.execution.error ? $json.execution.error.message : 'Unknown error') : 'Unknown error'), severity: 'critical', data: { workflow: 'Strategy Generation Loop', execution: String($json.execution ? $json.execution.id : 'N/A') } }) }}
